revision.comment: Auto-generated page using script written by Immanuelle, either as a placeholder redirect or to make bots recognize the page as made by Immanuelle
revision.text: [[Category:New uncategorized original categories]]

revision.comment: 新規
revision.text:
*[[:Category:主要カテゴリ|主要カテゴリ]]>[[:Category:世界|世界]]>[[:Category:国|国]]>[[:Category:日本|日本]]>[[:Category:日本の統治機構|日本の統治機構]]>[[:Category:日本の行政|日本の行政]]>[[:Category:日本の市町村|日本の市町村]]>[[:Category:静岡県の市町村|静岡県の市町村]]>葵区 ---- [[静岡県]][[葵区]]に関するカテゴリ。
[[category:静岡県の市町村|あおいく]]

revision.comment: カテゴリの位置を変更
revision.text:
*[[:Category:主要カテゴリ|主要カテゴリ]]>[[:Category:世界|世界]]>[[:Category:国|国]]>[[:Category:日本|日本]]>[[:Category:日本の統治機構|日本の統治機構]]>[[:Category:日本の行政|日本の行政]]>[[:Category:日本の市町村|日本の市町村]]>[[:Category:静岡県の市町村|静岡県の市町村]]>[[:Category:静岡市|静岡市]]>[[:Category:静岡市の区|静岡市の区]]>葵区 ---- [[静岡県]][[静岡市]][[葵区]]に関するカテゴリ。
[[Category:静岡市の区|あおいく]]

pathnav → 地域別の地理
Adding commonscat
体裁を調整。
1 revision imported: importing programmatically created pages
revision.text: [[Category:New uncategorized original categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]

revision.comment: adding dummy category to make categories work

revision.comment: Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q15277361)
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Text replacement - "[[Ja:" to "[[ja:"
Text replacement - "{{Wikidata link|" to "{{wikidata link|"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but actually having wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories in qq but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
